title: Strategy Pattern with Traits
description: Define a family of interchangeable algorithms behind a trait. Callers program against the trait, and concrete implementations can be swapped at compile time (generics) or runtime (trait objects). This is Rust's version of the classic Strategy/Dependency Injection pattern.
whenToUse: When you need pluggable algorithms (sorting, compression, hashing)
When you want to decouple behavior from the code that uses it
realWorldUse: std::io::Read/Write traits (any I/O source), serde's Serializer/Deserializer, tower::Service (HTTP middleware), Iterator trait itself. Virtually every trait in Rust is a strategy pattern.
